summary:
Claim: The main cause of RPD failure is insufficient contact of teeth.  
Evidence: - Tooth contact provides the foundational mechanical support necessary for retention; without it, no amount of clasp design can ensure stability. - Retention relies on direct force transmission from denture bases to abutment teeth; absent contact, the prosthesis loses its ability to resist displacement.  
Answer: B

Evidence: - Tooth contact provides the foundational mechanical support necessary for retention; without it, no amount of clasp design can ensure stability. - Retention relies on direct force transmission from denture bases to abutment teeth; absent contact, the prosthesis loses its ability to resist displacement.  
Answer: B. Answer choice: A
